summary: V37.0 Sovereign Mixer (Unified Creator Console) testing complete. 16/17 tests passed. Fixed 1 bug: mixer was visible on /sovereign-hub when it should be hidden. All mixer features working: 8 tool tabs, slide-up panels, FX filters applying CSS to #app-stage, text overlays, module navigation, fullscreen mode.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Mixer was visible on /sovereign-hub - added '/sovereign-hub' to hideMixer array

issues: Minor: Tapping same tab to close panel shows panel still visible briefly (animation timing) - not a blocker

context_for_next_testing_agent: V37.0 Sovereign Mixer fully tested. All 8 tool tabs working (Mix, Rec, Audio, Text, Layer, FX, AI, Out). FX filters apply real CSS to #app-stage. Text overlays render on screen. Module navigation from Mix panel works. Fullscreen mode hides/shows nav bar correctly. Mixer hidden on /sovereign-hub, /auth, /landing, /intro.

tests_executed.details: Mixer nav bar with 8 tabs visible at bottom of page
Found: mix, record, audio, text, overlay, effects, ai, export

tests_executed.test: 3. Mix tab opens fader bank panel
tests_executed.details: Panel opens with 7 pillar faders (PRA, DIV, SAN, NOU, EXP, SAG, COU) and master fader
Practice pillar expands showing module faders with mute/solo buttons and navigation labels
Panel closes but animation shows it briefly visible - minor timing issue
8 toggle buttons (Blur, Bright, Contrast, Hue, Saturate, Sepia, Invert, RESET) and 3 sliders found

tests_executed.test: 7. FX Blur applies CSS filter to #app-stage
tests_executed.details: Filter applied: blur(3.69917px) brightness(1) contrast(1) hue-rotate(0deg) saturate(1) sepia(0) invert(0)
Filter reset to blur(0px)
All 3 capture buttons present

tests_executed.test: 10. Audio tab shows Record Voice and Master Volume
tests_executed.details: Both controls present

tests_executed.test: 11. Text tab shows textarea and 6 style buttons
tests_executed.details: Input and all 6 buttons (Title, Subtitle, Caption, Quote, Label, Watermark) found
All 3 buttons present

tests_executed.test: 13. Out tab shows aspect ratios and Export/Broadcast
tests_executed.details: 5 aspect ratio buttons (16:9, 9:16, 1:1, 4:3, 4:5) and Export/Broadcast buttons found
Nav bar hidden, exit fullscreen button visible
Nav bar restored after clicking exit fullscreen
Fixed by adding '/sovereign-hub' to hideMixer array in UnifiedCreatorConsole.js
Mixer correctly hidden on all these pages
Text overlay with 'Test Overlay Text' rendered on screen
Clicking Meditation module navigated to /meditation

tests_executed.test: 20. AI panel opens with prompt input
tests_executed.details: AI panel shows 6 AI tool buttons and prompt textarea
